name: blackraptor-council
description: A 12-seat executive advisory council convened through a challenge protocol (sourced evidence, confidence labels, counter-case, voice-of-customer, 'what you lose'). Seats: product-strategy, gtm-strategy, pricing-strategy, finance, market-insight, ethics-governance, revenue, people-org, technology-strategy, fundraising-ir, growth-engine — coordinated by the council-orchestrator.
